creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 25 Oct 2012 23:38:02 +0000 (GMT)
Michael Carlson <mike@bayphoto.com> wrote:

> Puppet's documentation also says that facter 1.6.2 is a requirement =
for 3.0, but sysutil/facter is still at 1.6.11

Isn't 1.6.11 greater than 1.6.2? (11 > 2) or is this upstream using
some really horrible/bizarre versioning scheme? I know that the ports
tree definitely sees 1.6.11 as greater than 1.6.2.
